summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG logistics application's modern redesign. All major UI components, login functionality, dashboard KPI cards, sidebar navigation, and global theme successfully verified.

console_warnings.issue: Non-boolean attribute warnings and missing key props in lists
500 server errors and WebSocket connection failures
console_warnings.impact: Non-critical for UI - may affect real-time features
console_warnings.symptoms: WebSocket handshake failures, some API 500 responses

passed_tests: Login page modern split-panel design loads correctly
Login functionality with admin/user@1234 credentials works
Dashboard loads with 'Tableau de bord' title and subtitle
4 modern KPI cards display with colored icons and progress bars
Mode button is clickable and functional
Dark sidebar theme applied with 34 menu items visible
Global CSS theme active (16px border-radius, Manrope font on titles)
No critical JavaScript console errors breaking UI
